description: Content-type classification for puzzle quality tiers. Defines curated/practice/training categories and their detection rules.

changelog.author: initial
changelog.changes: Initial content-type classification with curated/practice/training categories, teaching patterns, and thresholds.

1.name: curated
1.description: High-quality puzzles with unique first moves, deep refutations, verified solution trees

2.name: practice
2.description: Standard puzzles suitable for regular training — proper solution trees without training noise

3.name: training
3.description: Teaching examples, trivial captures, tutorial puzzles — useful for learning concepts
